title: Add ZcashClient import
description: Import the generated ZcashClient at the top of your main module.
beforeCode:
const Bitcoin = require("bitcoin-core");
const rpc = new Bitcoin({ port: 18332 });
notes: This replaces the Bitcoin RPC connection with ZcashClient (zebrad + zkool).

title: Configure Zcash node connection
description: Set zebrad and zkool connection details.
notes: Adjust host/port if your nodes are remote. zebrad = chain data, zkool = wallet operations.

title: getbalance → z_gettotalbalance
description: Returns {transparent, private, total}. Use 'private' for shielded balance.
notes: This call changes behavior — uses shielded pool with zk-SNARK proofs.

title: getblock → getblock
afterCode:
// Same RPC — works on zebrad identically
const block = await client.chain.getblock(hashOrHeight, 1);
notes: Compatible — works the same on zebrad. No changes required.

title: getbalance → z_gettotalbalance
description: Returns {transparent, private, total}. Use 'private' for shielded balance.
notes: This call changes behavior — uses shielded pool with zk-SNARK proofs.
